cases.name: carry a node through WITH and re-match it by ID
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.value = 1 with n match (b) where id(b) = id(n) return b

cases.name: exclude second-stage results using a collected list from the first stage
cases.cypher: match (g1:NodeKind1) where g1.name starts with 'test' with collect(g1.domain) as excludes match (d:NodeKind2) where d.name starts with 'other' and not d.name in excludes return d

cases.name: three-stage pipeline carrying nodes through successive WITH clauses
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.value = 1 with n match (f) where f.name = 'me' with f match (b) where id(b) = id(f) return b

cases.name: filter a carried node using a per-group count in a WITH stage
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1)<-[:EdgeKind1]-(:NodeKind2) where n.objectid ends with '-516' with n, count(n) as dc_count where dc_count = 1 return n

cases.name: preserve anchored optional-match rows when counting absent relationships
cases.cypher: match (g:NodeKind1) optional match (g)<-[r:EdgeKind1]-(m:NodeKind2) with g, count(r) as memberCount where memberCount = 0 return g

cases.name: filter typed nodes by a regular expression and carry collected results to the next stage
cases.cypher: match (cg:NodeKind1) where cg.name =~ ".*TT" with collect(cg.name) as names return names

cases.name: expand from a typed node count reachable typed targets and order by that count
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.hasspn = true match (n)-[:EdgeKind1|EdgeKind2*1..]->(c:NodeKind2) with distinct n, count(c) as adminCount return n order by adminCount desc limit 100

cases.name: correlate bound expansion results before counting reachable targets
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n.correlationcase = 'bound-expansion-count' match (n)-[:EdgeKind1|EdgeKind2*1..]->(c:NodeKind2) with distinct n, count(c) as adminCount where n.name = 'alpha' return adminCount

cases.name: unwind a collected list carried from a WITH stage
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1) where a.tag = 'collect_unwind' with collect(a.name) as names unwind names as name return name order by name

cases.name: preserve rows through chained optional matches with a missing second hop
cases.cypher: match (a:NodeKind1) where a.name = 'anchor' optional match (a)-[:EdgeKind1]->(b:NodeKind2) optional match (b)-[:EdgeKind2]->(c:NodeKind1) return a, b, c
